packet_markdown:
# The Apartment Residences at AKA building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: aka-8500-sunset-8500-sunset-blvd
- Address: 8500 Sunset Boulevard, West Hollywood, CA 90069
- Primary URL: https://www.8500sunsetapartments.com/
- Management company: Korman Communities
- Recommended status: tour_candidate
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Management: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 4

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site still markets pet-friendly annual leasing with pool deck, high-tech fitness center, and 24/7 resident services for packages and deliveries. Source: Apartment Residences at AKA official site (https://www.8500sunsetapartments.com/). Note: Official materials support pool deck, high-tech fitness center, and 24/7 resident services.
- [review] Apartment Finder currently lists an outdoor lounge and pool deck, fitness center, private cinema, and a 24-hour on-site team. Source: Apartment Finder (https://www.apartmentfinder.com/California/West-Hollywood-Apartments/Aka-West-Hollywood-Apartment-Residences-Apartments-m5bpqmh). Note: Public listing reinforces the outdoor lounge, pool deck, private cinema, and 24-hour team.
- [review] Apartments.com still shows active inventory and current pricing for the building. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/aka-west-hollywood-apartment-residences-west-hollywood-ca/x4brlmm/). Note: Apartments.com displayed current leasing inventory and pricing.

## Open questions
- Verify exact pet terms, whether there is any coworking-style work area, and which available units are least exposed to Sunset Strip noise.

## Notes
Tour candidate. The building looks professionally run and very well equipped, with the main tradeoff being Sunset Strip exposure rather than missing essentials or weak operations.
